# Ismael Marin — Staff Software Engineer & AI Engineer

> Tech Lead and Staff Software Engineer with 20 years of remote software development experience. Specialized in scaling Ruby on Rails monoliths, architecting high-performance systems in Rust, and building developer-centric Agentic AI integrations & Model Context Protocol (MCP) infrastructure. Based in Leon, Mexico.

## Person

- **Name**: Ismael Guillermo Marin Cabrera (Ismael G. Marin, Ismael Marin, Ismael Marin Cabrera)
- **Role**: Tech Lead, Staff Software Engineer, AI Engineer, Ruby on Rails, Ruby Engineer
- **Experience**: 20 years building software — all remote
- **Focus**: Ruby on Rails + AI tooling — bridging backend Rails monoliths with agentic AI/MCP systems
- **Location**: Leon, Mexico
- **Email**: ismael.marin@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +52 477 792 9000
- **Scheduler**: https://cal.com/ismael-marin/lets-talk

## Open Source Projects

### ruby-skill-bench
- **URL**: https://igmarin.github.io/ruby-skill-bench/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/igmarin/ruby-skill-bench
- **RubyGems**: https://rubygems.org/gems/ruby-skill-bench
- **Description**: High-fidelity evaluation engine for benchmarking AI agent skills. Runs an agent twice (baseline vs. with skill), then uses a blind LLM judge to score both outputs across 5 dimensions. The difference is the skill's measurable ROI.

### rails-ai-bridge
- **URL**: https://igmarin.github.io/rails-ai-bridge-site/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/igmarin/rails-ai-bridge
- **RubyGems**: https://rubygems.org/gems/rails-ai-bridge
- **Description**: Turn any Rails app into an AI-ready codebase — one command, zero config. Generates static context files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, copilot-instructions.md) and runs a live MCP server for real-time Rails introspection.

### rails-agent-skills
- **URL**: https://igmarin.github.io/rails-agent-skills-site/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/igmarin/rails-agent-skills
- **Description**: Curated AI agent skill library for Ruby on Rails development. 43 executable skills and 9 workflows teaching AI coding tools how to plan, test, implement, document, and review Rails work using production-minded conventions. Tests gate implementation.

### agent-mcp-runtime
- **URL**: https://igmarin.github.io/agent-mcp-runtime-site/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/igmarin/agent-mcp-runtime
- **Description**: Safe Rust CLI for Model Context Protocol (MCP) runtime management. Orchestrates communication between LLMs and external tools using the ReAct reasoning pattern.

### ruby-core-skills
- **URL**: https://igmarin.github.io/ruby-core-skills-site/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/igmarin/ruby-core-skills
- **Description**: Core Ruby skills for AI agent evaluation. A structured library of language fundamentals and idiomatic patterns that AI agents are tested against.

### hanakai-yaku
- **URL**: https://igmarin.github.io/hanakai-yaku-site/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/igmarin/hanakai-yaku
- **Description**: Curated library of atomic development skills and orchestrated agents for AI coding assistants, enforcing TDD and DDD discipline for Hanami 2.x Ruby applications.

### agnostic-planning-skills
- **URL**: https://igmarin.github.io/agnostic-planning-skills-site/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/igmarin/agnostic-planning-skills
- **Description**: Framework-agnostic AI planning capabilities. Enforces PM and software engineering planning discipline with structured templates for PRDs and task estimation.

## Services

- **AI Integration & Tooling**: Integrate LLMs into existing Rails monoliths, build MCP servers, setup agent-based workflows
- **Staff Augmentation**: Staff/Lead level feature development, driving complex technical initiatives from PRD to production
- **Architecture Consulting**: System design, performance optimization, ADR authoring for scaling Ruby on Rails applications

## Tech Stack

- **Core**: Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, Redis, Rust, Docker, AWS, Cloudflare, Vercel
- **AI & Tooling**: Claude (Anthropic), Gemini, DeepSeek, OpenAI Codex, MCP, Cursor, GitHub Copilot
- **Architecture**: Domain-Driven Design, TDD / RSpec, GraphQL, Agentic AI Systems

## Writing

Articles on Medium covering Rails, AI engineering, and software architecture:

- [How I Built a Composable AI Skill Ecosystem for Ruby with Help from 4 Different AI Agents](https://medium.com/@igmarin/how-i-built-a-composable-ai-skill-ecosystem-for-ruby-with-help-from-4-different-ai-agents-009d72a9d179)
- [Your JSON Column Is Not a Settings System](https://medium.com/@igmarin/your-json-column-is-not-a-settings-system-4b7dc46e747f)
- [The Engineer Who Understands the Product Will Always Win](https://medium.com/@igmarin/the-engineer-who-understands-the-product-will-always-win-1b073585915c)
- [Beyond Vibe Coding: How rails-ai-bridge Achieved "Semantic Parity"](https://medium.com/@igmarin/beyond-vibe-coding-how-rails-ai-bridge-v2-2-0-6e970d2cfd55)
- [Stop "Vibe Coding": How I Bridged the Gap Between Rails and AI](https://medium.com/@igmarin/stop-vibe-coding-how-i-bridged-the-gap-between-rails-and-ai-063eaf0a0304)

## Media & Thought Leadership

- **De Mentes Aumentadas (Augmented Minds)**: Syndicated bi-weekly AI and technology segment broadcasted on national FM radio and distributed globally as a Spotify podcast (in Spanish 🇪🇸). Discusses agentic workflows, big data synchronization, privacy mechanics, and tech ethics.
  - Spotify Show: https://open.spotify.com/show/1heMVnJeTE32SFUNzOWdFe
  - Featured Episode: "¿Nos escucha el celular? (Is our cellphone listening to us?)" (https://open.spotify.com/episode/22tL5m5SVRQd5mHObFJ819) — detailing the mechanics of cookie synchronization, track networks, and predictive machine learning models vs. active audio wiretapping.
